title: Verilog default_nettype none behaviour
body:
Picking up from a Verible lint rule discussion, below is a test that as per LRM should throw error due to clk not declared as wire. Icarus does not seem to do that:

```verilog
`default_nettype none

module m (input clk);
endmodule
```

Tailpiece information:

Big 3s do:
* One passes without any err/warn - just like Icarus
* One throws an error (suppressible)
* One issues a warning
